name: lavozsalsa-desktop
description: Aplicacion de escritorio de La Voz Salsa para radio y TV en vivo.
author: La Voz Salsa

scripts.installer:release:mac: npm run installer:prepare && npm run installer:build:mac:dmg
scripts.installer:release:mac:zip: npm run installer:prepare && npm run installer:build:mac:dir && npm run installer:package:mac
scripts.release:finalize: npm run release:verify && npm run release:manifest
scripts.build:mac:dir:local: npm run prepare:mac-base && LVS_DESKTOP_LOCAL_ELECTRON=1 node ./scripts/run-release-command.js electron-builder --mac dir --x64 --arm64 --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.release:mac: npm run build:mac:dir && npm run package:mac
scripts.release:mac:local: npm run build:mac:dir:local && npm run package:mac
scripts.release:all:local: npm run release:mac:local && npm run release:win
scripts.dist:mac:local: npm run prepare:mac-base && LVS_DESKTOP_LOCAL_ELECTRON=1 node ./scripts/run-release-command.js electron-builder --mac dmg --config electron-builder.config.js
